description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular, light wood body with three horizontally aligned drawers on the front. Each drawer is adorned with a bold orange circular handle, creating a playful and modern visual accent. The chest sits on four small, yellow caster wheels, making it easy to move and adding a touch of color contrast. The sides and back are plain, with a smooth, unadorned wood finish. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional form suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces. The drawers appear spacious, providing ample storage for various items.
description: A light wood chest of drawers with three orange circular handles and yellow caster wheels, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with orange circular handles and yellow wheels visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, smooth wood panel and two yellow wheels at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view showing an unadorned, flat wood surface with yellow wheels barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wood panel and two yellow wheels at the base.
